parameters.toolDescription: Run a SQL query against either the source database (source.duckdb) or the vault database (vault.duckdb). Use database=/data/source.duckdb for raw ERP/procurement/WMS data and database=/data/vault.duckdb for vault and mart tables.

values.name: sql
values.description: The SQL query to execute. Use schema-qualified names (e.g. erp.products) for source.duckdb tables, and unqualified names (e.g. hub_product) for vault.duckdb tables.

values.name: database
values.description: The database file path to query. Must be either /data/source.duckdb (for raw source data in erp, procurement, wms schemas) or /data/vault.duckdb (for vault hub/link/satellite tables and mart tables).

parameters.name: describe_schema
parameters.description: List all tables available in a database. Returns table names grouped by schema. Use database=/data/source.duckdb for source tables or database=/data/vault.duckdb for vault and mart tables.

parameters.toolDescription: Send a natural language question about inventory to the Dispatcher agent. The agent will query source data, build Data Vault tables if needed, and return structured results including the mart data, routing decision, and any data quality issues.

values.name: question
values.description: A natural language inventory question, e.g. Which products are below safety stock? or Show me purchase orders by vendor.
